user.title: IKEA BILRESA
user.description: Connect to the Matter Server that already controls your BILRESA wheels. The URL is pre-filled from your Matter integration — leave it as is unless you run the Matter Server elsewhere.

reconfigure.title: Change Matter Server connection
reconfigure.description: Update the Matter Server WebSocket URL. The new address is tested before the integration reconnects.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Matter Server. Check the URL and that the Matter Server add-on is running.

abort.already_configured: IKEA BILRESA is already set up.

user.title: Bind a wheel channel to a target
user.description: Choose a profile or copy an existing binding, then configure scroll and button actions.

data.copy_from: Copy settings from an existing binding (optional)
data.target: Target (light, media player, cover, climate, fan, number)
data.min_brightness: Minimum brightness (%, 0 = scroll can switch off)
data.click_target: Single-press target (optional, defaults to the light)
data.hold_target: Hold target (optional, used by Toggle entity)
data.scenes: Scenes cycled by single press (optional, overrides its action)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure control binding
reconfigure.description: Adjust how this wheel channel controls its target.

data.target: Target (light, media player, cover, climate, fan, number)
data.min_brightness: Minimum brightness (%, 0 = scroll can switch off)
data.click_target: Single-press target (optional, defaults to the light)
data.hold_target: Hold target (optional, used by Toggle entity)
data.scenes: Scenes cycled by single press (optional, overrides its action)

abort.no_wheels: No BILRESA wheels have been discovered yet. Make sure the wheel works in the Matter integration, then try again.

cannot_connect.title: Cannot reach the Matter Server
cannot_connect.description: IKEA BILRESA cannot connect to the Matter Server at {url}. Scroll wheels won't respond until the connection is restored. Check that the Matter Server add-on is running.
